file.content:
# Feedback â€” Bull market psychology overrides caution signals (2026-05-21)

## Insight (user-stated)

Khi thل»‹ trئ°ل»‌ng vأ o BULL state trong thل»‌i gian khأ´ng quأ، ngل؛¯n (vأ i thأ،ng+), mل»چi ngئ°ل»‌i ؤ‘ل»پu thل؛¯ng, **tأ¢m lأ½ lل؛،c quan thأ،i quأ،** ؤ‘أ¨ bل؛¹p cأ،c yل؛؟u tل»‘ thل؛­n trل»چng:

- **Concentration khأ´ng cأ²n quأ، quan trل»چng**: dأ¹ narrow/VIC-led, retail vل؛«n FOMO vأ o cل»• phiل؛؟u nأ³ng â†’ broad market tiل؛؟p tل»¥c lأھn
- **US crisis cإ©ng khأ´ng ل؛£nh hئ°ل»ںng**: dأ¹ SPX_DD_1Y hay VIX bأ،o nguy, ngئ°ل»‌i vل؛«n kiل؛؟m tiل»پn VN â†’ vل؛«n tham â†’ khأ´ng sell
- **Yل؛؟u tل»‘ thل؛­n trل»چng (caution gate, override) khأ´ng cأ²n predictive** trong giai ؤ‘oل؛،n nأ y

## Implication cho state-system design

Cأ،c filter "conservative" nhئ°:
- `concentration_smooth â‰¤ 0.55` (v3.3b)
- `US shock override` (v3.1)
- `r_dual < 0.60` (v3.2 waypoint)

ؤگل»پu giل؛£ ؤ‘ل»‹nh **fundamentals quan trل»چng**. Trong **sustained bull psychology**, fundamentals tل؛،m thل»‌i bل»‹ disable bل»ںi flow.

## Evidence tل»« historical fires (v3.3b context)

content.subject: Build v3.2 state series with CRISISâ†’NEUTRAL waypoint rule
content.description: Apply waypoint rule: when state_raw goes CRISISâ†’NEUTRAL directly and r_dual<0.60, force state=BEAR instead. Re-smooth (mode3+ms2). Save vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_2_full_history.csv.

content.subject: Backtest V11 12y with v3.2 vs v3.1 baseline
content.description: Run canonical V11 BA stack (BAL+VN30+ETF) 2014-2026 50B NAV with both state series. Compare CAGR / Sharpe / MaxDD / Calmar / Wealth / Mid 18-23 / OOS 24-26 / Y2022 / Q1 2026.

content.subject: Investigate downgrade weakness (path c)
content.description: 141 downgrade transitions T+20 win 44% (essentially random) but mean edge -0.77pp. Profile by fromâ†’to pair, r_dual at trigger, US-override status, era. Look for actionable failure mode.

content.subject: Build v3.3 RSI gate state series
content.description: Apply F6 rule: skip 1-step downgrades when RSI(14) â‰¥ 55. Hold blocked state until RSI<55, state recovers, or 2-step downgrade fires. Save vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_3_full_history.csv.
content.activeForm: Building v3.3 RSI gate state series

content.subject: Backtest V11 12y v3.3 vs v3.1 baseline
content.description: Reuse test harness from test_v3_2_vs_v3_1.py. Compare v3.3 to v3.1 across FULL/OOS/Mid/Y2022/Q1 2026 + year-by-year.

content.subject: Diagnose conc at v3.3 fire dates
content.description: For all 31 RSI-gate fires, compute concentration and forward returns. Identify which fires would be blocked at various conc thresholds and whether they correlate with good/bad outcomes.

content.subject: Build & backtest v3.3 conc variants
content.description: Build 2-3 v3.3 variants with conc threshold filters. Run V11 12y backtest, compare against v3.1 baseline and v3.3 RSI-only. Focus on Q1 2026 and OOS metrics.

content.subject: Walk-forward robustness test v3.3b threshold
content.description: Sweep conc thresholds [0.40, 0.45, 0.50, 0.55, 0.60, 0.65, 0.70, no-filter] in V11 12y backtest. Verify (a) plateau of similar performance across range (robustness), (b) IS-best (2014-2021) matches OOS-best (2022-2026) ranking â€” non-overfit check.

content.subject: (1) Upload v3.3b state series to BigQuery
content.description: bq load vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_3b_full_history.csv â†’ tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v33b_clean. Verify with row count + last 3 rows.

content.subject: (2) Build transitions HTML for v3.3b
content.description: Adapt build_v3_1_transitions_html.py to read v3.3b. Add columns: RSI at trigger + conc at trigger + 'RSI-gate active?' indicator. Highlight blocked vs allowed transitions.

content.subject: (3) Update memory with v3.3b + psychology insight
content.description: Write tam_quan_v3_3b_can_than.md (full spec + walk-forward results). Write feedback_bull_market_psychology.md (user's observation on sustained-bull psychology). Update MEMORY.md index. Consolidate if over limit.

content.subject: (4) Build shadow tracker script for v3.3b
content.description: Daily script comparing v3.1 live vs v3.3b candidate: report any state diff today + cumulative alpha. Run via /loop or manual.

content.subject: (5) Update state_transition_logic with v3.3b notes
content.description: Add v3.3b RSI gate + conc filter logic to state_transition_logic.py explainer.

content.subject: Define "true bull regime" candidate criteria
content.description: Build diagnostic to identify historical bull regimes using multiple definitions (state persistence, MA200 dev, multi-month return, drawdown-free). Report which periods qualify and stats.

content.subject: Test conservative filters during/outside bull regime
content.description: For US override fires + conc filter blocks + RSI gate activations, split by whether they happened during "confirmed bull" vs not. Compare HELP/HURT rates. Verifies user's hypothesis: filters lose predictive power in true bull.

content.subject: Build v3.4 variants with bull confirmation

content.subject: Walk-forward test v3.4b BTC threshold + horizon

# Feedback â€” Bull market psychology overrides caution signals (2026-05-21)

## Insight (user-stated)

Khi thل»‹ trئ°ل»‌ng vأ o BULL state trong thل»‌i gian khأ´ng quأ، ngل؛¯n (vأ i thأ،ng+), mل»چi ngئ°ل»‌i ؤ‘ل»پu thل؛¯ng, **tأ¢m lأ½ lل؛،c quan thأ،i quأ،** ؤ‘أ¨ bل؛¹p cأ،c yل؛؟u tل»‘ thل؛­n trل»چng:

- **Concentration khأ´ng cأ²n quأ، quan trل»چng**: dأ¹ narrow/VIC-led, retail vل؛«n FOMO vأ o cل»• phiل؛؟u nأ³ng â†’ broad market tiل؛؟p tل»¥c lأھn
- **US crisis cإ©ng khأ´ng ل؛£nh hئ°ل»ںng**: dأ¹ SPX_DD_1Y hay VIX bأ،o nguy, ngئ°ل»‌i vل؛«n kiل؛؟m tiل»پn VN â†’ vل؛«n tham â†’ khأ´ng sell
- **Yل؛؟u tل»‘ thل؛­n trل»چng (caution gate, override) khأ´ng cأ²n predictive** trong giai ؤ‘oل؛،n nأ y

## Implication cho state-system design

Cأ،c filter "conservative" nhئ°:
- `concentration_smooth â‰¤ 0.55` (v3.3b)
- `US shock override` (v3.1)
- `r_dual < 0.60` (v3.2 waypoint)

ؤگل»پu giل؛£ ؤ‘ل»‹nh **fundamentals quan trل»چng**. Trong **sustained bull psychology**, fundamentals tل؛،m thل»‌i bل»‹ disable bل»ںi flow.

## Evidence tل»« historical fires (v3.3b context)

- **2021 super-bull** (post-COVID): 5 fires gل»“m 2021-03-30 conc=0.51, 2021-04-20 conc=0.47, 2021-05-20 conc=0.61, 2021-06-11 conc=0.65, 2021-04-20 EX-BULLâ†’BULL conc=0.47. Hل؛§u hل؛؟t HELP (gate giل»¯ BULL/EX-BULL) â†’ portfolio +83-89% nؤƒm 2021.
- **2025-Q1 bull**: gate fire 2025-03-12 (conc 0.29, RSI 82, r_dual 0.85) â€” ALL signals nأ³i "tل»‘p lأ nh mل؛،nh", nhئ°ng vل؛«n HURT T+20 -12.4%. Bull psychology peak â†’ market roll over despite all positives.
- **Sustained bull (2020-09 â†’ 2022-01, ~16 thأ،ng BULL/EX-BULL)**: US crisis 2020-Q1 ؤ‘أ£ hل؛؟t tأ،c dل»¥ng (VN khأ´ng quan tأ¢m Mل»¹ sau khi ؤ‘أ£ thل؛¯ng). US-override fires giل؛£m hiل»‡u lل»±c rأµ rل»‡t trong giai ؤ‘oل؛،n nأ y.

## Future v3.4+ research direction

Add **"bull-fatigue counter"**:
```
if state in {BULL, EX-BULL} continuously for > N_DAYS sessions:
    # disable conservative filters
    use raw state signal (no conc filter, no US-override)
    only re-enable filters when state drops to NEUTRAL or below
```

Candidate N_DAYS: 60-120 sessions (3-6 months sustained bull). Cل؛§n backtest tل»«ng giأ، trل»‹.

**Mechanism**: trong sustained bull, momentum self-reinforcing > fundamentals. Filtering bل؛±ng fundamentals = chasing wrong signal. Khi bull break (â†’NEUTRAL), psychology shift â†’ fundamentals lل؛،i quan trل»چng â†’ re-enable.

## Caveat cho deployment v3.3b

v3.3b chئ°a implement bull-fatigue counter. Trong sustained bull (vd 2026 nل؛؟u thل»‹ trئ°ل»‌ng hل»“i mل؛،nh), conc filter cأ³ thل»ƒ block cأ،c gates ؤ‘أ،ng giأ،. **Shadow track 2 tuل؛§n** sل؛½ chل»‰ catch short-term issues, khأ´ng phأ،t hiل»‡n sustained-bull psychology.

â†’ Monitor explicit: nل؛؟u sau 60 phiأھn BULL liأھn tل»¥c, conc filter bل؛¯t ؤ‘ل؛§u hurt â†’ cأ¢n nhل؛¯c disable hoل؛·c add fatigue counter.

## Related insights

- Connect to **`feedback_us_vn_correlation_interpretation.md`** â€” tail dependence chل»‰ matter ل»ں crisis tail, full-sample Pearson misleading. Bull psychology cإ©ng decouple US-VN linkage tل؛،m thل»‌i.
- Connect to **`ba_v11_production_proposal.md`** P3 overheat guard â€” VNI/MA200 > 1.30 + RSI > 0.75 â†’ AVOID. P3 ؤ‘أ£ cأ³ sل؛µn cho buy-side; gate logic chئ°a cأ³ equivalent cho state-side.

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
shadow_track_v3_3b.py
=====================
Daily shadow tracker for Tam Quan v3.3b "Cل؛©n Thل؛­n" (STAGING NEXT).

Run daily (e.g. 15:30 after market close) for 2 weeks before promote-to-live.

Each run:
  1. Pulls today's state from BQ `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state` (LIVE = Tinh Tل؛؟)
     and `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v33b_clean` (STAGING NEXT)
  2. Reports today's state diff (and history of all diffs in the shadow window)
  3. Computes cumulative VN-Index alpha if user had switched to v3.3b
  4. Appends today's snapshot to shadow_log_v3_3b.csv

Promote decision criteria (after 2 weeks):
  - No catastrophic divergence (v3.3b cum alpha vs LIVE within [-3%, +3%])
  - Gate fires count > 0 (rule is firing on real signals)
  - No sustained bull-psychology failure mode (per feedback_bull_market_psychology)

Usage:
  python shadow_track_v3_3b.py             # daily report
  python shadow_track_v3_3b.py --backfill  # rebuild log from start_date
"""
import sys, io, os, subprocess, argparse
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BQ = r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"

STATE_NAMES = {1:"CRISIS", 2:"BEAR", 3:"NEUTRAL", 4:"BULL", 5:"EX-BULL"}
STATE_WEIGHT = {1:0.0, 2:0.2, 3:0.7, 4:1.0, 5:1.3}

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
shadow_track_v3_3b.py
=====================
Daily shadow tracker for Tam Quan v3.3b "Cل؛©n Thل؛­n" (STAGING NEXT).

Run daily (e.g. 15:30 after market close) for 2 weeks before promote-to-live.

Each run:
  1. Pulls today's state from BQ `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state` (LIVE = Tinh Tل؛؟)
     and `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v33b_clean` (STAGING NEXT)
  2. Reports today's state diff (and history of all diffs in the shadow window)
  3. Computes cumulative VN-Index alpha if user had switched to v3.3b
  4. Appends today's snapshot to shadow_log_v3_3b.csv

Promote decision criteria (after 2 weeks):
  - No catastrophic divergence (v3.3b cum alpha vs LIVE within [-3%, +3%])
  - Gate fires count > 0 (rule is firing on real signals)
  - No sustained bull-psychology failure mode (per feedback_bull_market_psychology)

Usage:
  python shadow_track_v3_3b.py             # daily report
  python shadow_track_v3_3b.py --backfill  # rebuild log from start_date
"""
import sys, io, os, subprocess, argparse
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BQ = r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"

STATE_NAMES = {1:"CRISIS", 2:"BEAR", 3:"NEUTRAL", 4:"BULL", 5:"EX-BULL"}
STATE_WEIGHT = {1:0.0, 2:0.2, 3:0.7, 4:1.0, 5:1.3}

SHADOW_START = pd.Timestamp("2026-05-21")   # day v3.3b promoted to STAGING NEXT
SHADOW_END   = pd.Timestamp("[REDACTED]04")   # +2 weeks
LOG_FILE     = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "shadow_log_v3_3b.csv")

def bq_query(sql):
    # Use stdin for SQL â€” avoids Windows cmd quoting issues
    cmd = f'"{BQ}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000'
    result = subprocess.run(cmd, input=sql, capture_output=True, text=True,
                            timeout=120, shell=True)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(f"BQ error: {result.stderr or '(no stderr)'} | stdout: {result.stdout[:200]}")
    from io import StringIO
    if not result.stdout.strip():
        return pd.DataFrame()
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(result.stdout))


def fetch_states_and_close(start_d, end_d):
    """Pull v3.1 LIVE, v3.3b STAGING, and VNINDEX close for date range."""
    sql = f"""
    SELECT live.time, live.state AS state_live,
           v33b.state AS state_v33b, t.Close
    FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state AS live
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v33b_clean AS v33b ON v33b.time = live.time
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.ticker AS t ON t.time = live.time AND t.ticker = 'VNINDEX'
    WHERE live.time BETWEEN DATE '{start_d}' AND DATE '{end_d}'
    ORDER BY live.time
    """
    df = bq_query(sql)
    df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["time"])
    return df


def simulate_nav_pair(df, init=1e9, tc=0.001):
    """Compute paper NAV for both state series, capital-allocation only."""
    n = len(df); close = df["Close"].values
    ret = np.zeros(n); ret[1:] = close[1:]/close[:-1] - 1
    out = df.copy()
    for col in ["live", "v33b"]:
        state_col = f"state_{col}"
        target_w = df[state_col].map(STATE_WEIGHT).values
        pv = np.zeros(n); w = np.zeros(n); pv[0]=init; w[0]=target_w[0]
        for t in range(1, n):
            tgt = target_w[t]; w_new = tgt  # snap (shadow only â€” no ramp)
            trade = abs(w_new - w[t-1])
            daily = w_new * ret[t] - trade*tc
            pv[t] = pv[t-1]*(1+daily); w[t] = w_new
        out[f"nav_{col}"] = pv
    out["alpha_pct"] = (out["nav_v33b"] / out["nav_live"] - 1) * 100
    return out


def report(df_shadow):
    """Print summary of shadow window."""
    n = len(df_shadow); last = df_shadow.iloc[-1]
    print("="*80)
    print(f"ًں“، Shadow track Tam Quan v3.3b â€” report {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}")
    print("="*80)
    print(f"Window: {df_shadow['time'].iloc[0].date()} â†’ {df_shadow['time'].iloc[-1].date()}  ({n} sessions)")
    print(f"\nًں“… Today ({last['time'].date()}):")
    sl = int(last["state_live"]); sv = int(last["state_v33b"])
    sl_name = STATE_NAMES.get(sl,"?"); sv_name = STATE_NAMES.get(sv,"?")
    diff = "ًںں¢ SAME" if sl == sv else f"ًںں  DIFF ({sl_name} vs {sv_name})"
    print(f"  LIVE Tinh Tل؛؟:  {sl_name} ({sl})    weight {STATE_WEIGHT[sl]:.0%}")
    print(f"  v3.3b Cل؛©n Thل؛­n: {sv_name} ({sv})    weight {STATE_WEIGHT[sv]:.0%}")
    print(f"  â†’ {diff}")

    # Count diff sessions
    n_diff = int((df_shadow["state_live"] != df_shadow["state_v33b"]).sum())
    print(f"\nًں“ٹ Shadow window statistics:")
    print(f"  Sessions with state diff: {n_diff}/{n}  ({n_diff/n*100:.0f}%)")
    print(f"  Cumulative alpha (v3.3b vs LIVE): {last['alpha_pct']:+.2f}%")
    final_live = last["nav_live"]/1e9; final_v33b = last["nav_v33b"]/1e9
    print(f"  Paper NAV (1B init): LIVE {final_live:.3f}B  |  v3.3b {final_v33b:.3f}B")

    # Days with diff
    diff_df = df_shadow[df_shadow["state_live"] != df_shadow["state_v33b"]]
    if len(diff_df) > 0:
        print(f"\nًں“‹ Days with state diff (last 10):")
        for _, r in diff_df.tail(10).iterrows():
            sl = STATE_NAMES.get(int(r["state_live"]),"?")
            sv = STATE_NAMES.get(int(r["state_v33b"]),"?")
            print(f"  {r['time'].date()}: LIVE {sl:<8}  v3.3b {sv:<8}  (alpha: {r['alpha_pct']:+.2f}%)")

    # Decision guidance
    days_into_shadow = (last["time"] - SHADOW_START).days
    days_remaining = max(0, (SHADOW_END - last["time"]).days)
    print(f"\nًںژ¯ Shadow progress: day {days_into_shadow}/14  ({days_remaining} days remaining)")
    if days_remaining == 0:
        print(f"  â–¶ DECISION POINT REACHED. Promote criteria:")
        cum_alpha = last["alpha_pct"]
        if -3.0 <= cum_alpha <= 3.0:
            print(f"    âœ“ Cum alpha {cum_alpha:+.2f}% within [-3%, +3%]")
        else:
            print(f"    âœ— Cum alpha {cum_alpha:+.2f}% OUT OF [-3%, +3%] â€” investigate before promote")
        if n_diff > 0:
            print(f"    âœ“ Gate fires confirmed ({n_diff} diff sessions)")
        else:
            print(f"    âڑ  No diff yet â€” gate hasn't fired, can't validate behavior")
    print("="*80)


def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--backfill", action="store_true", help="Rebuild log from SHADOW_START")
    ap.add_argument("--start", help="Override start date (YYYY-MM-DD)")
    ap.add_argument("--end", help="Override end date (YYYY-MM-DD), default=today")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    start_d = pd.Timestamp(args.start) if args.start else SHADOW_START
    end_d   = pd.Timestamp(args.end)   if args.end   else pd.Timestamp(datetime.now().date())

    print(f"Fetching states + close: {start_d.date()} â†’ {end_d.date()} ...")
    df = fetch_states_and_close(start_d.date(), end_d.date())
    if df.empty:
        print("âڑ  No data returned â€” BQ may be empty for this range")
        return
    df_nav = simulate_nav_pair(df)
    df_nav.to_csv(LOG_FILE, index=False)
    print(f"  Saved {len(df_nav)} sessions â†’ {LOG_FILE}")
    report(df_nav)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
shadow_track_v3_4b.py
=====================
Daily shadow tracker for Tam Quan v3.3b "Cل؛©n Thل؛­n" (STAGING NEXT).

Run daily (e.g. 15:30 after market close) for 2 weeks before promote-to-live.

Each run:
  1. Pulls today's state from BQ `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state` (LIVE = Tinh Tل؛؟)
     and `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v33b_clean` (STAGING NEXT)
  2. Reports today's state diff (and history of all diffs in the shadow window)
  3. Computes cumulative VN-Index alpha if user had switched to v3.3b
  4. Appends today's snapshot to shadow_log_v3_3b.csv

Promote decision criteria (after 2 weeks):
  - No catastrophic divergence (v3.3b cum alpha vs LIVE within [-3%, +3%])
  - Gate fires count > 0 (rule is firing on real signals)
  - No sustained bull-psychology failure mode (per feedback_bull_market_psychology)

Usage:
  python shadow_track_v3_4b.py             # daily report
  python shadow_track_v3_4b.py --backfill  # rebuild log from start_date
"""
import sys, io, os, subprocess, argparse
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BQ = r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"

STATE_NAMES = {1:"CRISIS", 2:"BEAR", 3:"NEUTRAL", 4:"BULL", 5:"EX-BULL"}
STATE_WEIGHT = {1:0.0, 2:0.2, 3:0.7, 4:1.0, 5:1.3}

SHADOW_START = pd.Timestamp("2026-05-21")   # day v3.3b promoted to STAGING NEXT
SHADOW_END   = pd.Timestamp("[REDACTED]04")   # +2 weeks
LOG_FILE     = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "shadow_log_v3_3b.csv")

def bq_query(sql):
    # Use stdin for SQL â€” avoids Windows cmd quoting issues
    cmd = f'"{BQ}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000'
    result = subprocess.run(cmd, input=sql, capture_output=True, text=True,
                            timeout=120, shell=True)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(f"BQ error: {result.stderr or '(no stderr)'} | stdout: {result.stdout[:200]}")
    from io import StringIO
    if not result.stdout.strip():
        return pd.DataFrame()
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(result.stdout))


def fetch_states_and_close(start_d, end_d):
    """Pull v3.1 LIVE, v3.3b STAGING, and VNINDEX close for date range."""
    sql = f"""
    SELECT live.time, live.state AS state_live,
           v33b.state AS state_v33b, t.Close
    FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state AS live
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v33b_clean AS v33b ON v33b.time = live.time
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.ticker AS t ON t.time = live.time AND t.ticker = 'VNINDEX'
    WHERE live.time BETWEEN DATE '{start_d}' AND DATE '{end_d}'
    ORDER BY live.time
    """
    df = bq_query(sql)
    df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["time"])
    return df


def simulate_nav_pair(df, init=1e9, tc=0.001):
    """Compute paper NAV for both state series, capital-allocation only."""
    n = len(df); close = df["Close"].values
    ret = np.zeros(n); ret[1:] = close[1:]/close[:-1] - 1
    out = df.copy()
    for col in ["live", "v33b"]:
        state_col = f"state_{col}"
        target_w = df[state_col].map(STATE_WEIGHT).values
        pv = np.zeros(n); w = np.zeros(n); pv[0]=init; w[0]=target_w[0]
        for t in range(1, n):
            tgt = target_w[t]; w_new = tgt  # snap (shadow only â€” no ramp)
            trade = abs(w_new - w[t-1])
            daily = w_new * ret[t] - trade*tc
            pv[t] = pv[t-1]*(1+daily); w[t] = w_new
        out[f"nav_{col}"] = pv
    out["alpha_pct"] = (out["nav_v33b"] / out["nav_live"] - 1) * 100
    return out


def report(df_shadow):
    """Print summary of shadow window."""
    n = len(df_shadow); last = df_shadow.iloc[-1]
    print("="*80)
    print(f"ًں“، Shadow track Tam Quan v3.3b â€” report {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}")
    print("="*80)
    print(f"Window: {df_shadow['time'].iloc[0].date()} â†’ {df_shadow['time'].iloc[-1].date()}  ({n} sessions)")
    print(f"\nًں“… Today ({last['time'].date()}):")
    sl = int(last["state_live"]); sv = int(last["state_v33b"])
    sl_name = STATE_NAMES.get(sl,"?"); sv_name = STATE_NAMES.get(sv,"?")
    diff = "ًںں¢ SAME" if sl == sv else f"ًںں  DIFF ({sl_name} vs {sv_name})"
    print(f"  LIVE Tinh Tل؛؟:  {sl_name} ({sl})    weight {STATE_WEIGHT[sl]:.0%}")
    print(f"  v3.3b Cل؛©n Thل؛­n: {sv_name} ({sv})    weight {STATE_WEIGHT[sv]:.0%}")
    print(f"  â†’ {diff}")

    # Count diff sessions
    n_diff = int((df_shadow["state_live"] != df_shadow["state_v33b"]).sum())
    print(f"\nًں“ٹ Shadow window statistics:")
    print(f"  Sessions with state diff: {n_diff}/{n}  ({n_diff/n*100:.0f}%)")
    print(f"  Cumulative alpha (v3.3b vs LIVE): {last['alpha_pct']:+.2f}%")
    final_live = last["nav_live"]/1e9; final_v33b = last["nav_v33b"]/1e9
    print(f"  Paper NAV (1B init): LIVE {final_live:.3f}B  |  v3.3b {final_v33b:.3f}B")

    # Days with diff
    diff_df = df_shadow[df_shadow["state_live"] != df_shadow["state_v33b"]]
    if len(diff_df) > 0:
        print(f"\nًں“‹ Days with state diff (last 10):")
        for _, r in diff_df.tail(10).iterrows():
            sl = STATE_NAMES.get(int(r["state_live"]),"?")
            sv = STATE_NAMES.get(int(r["state_v33b"]),"?")
            print(f"  {r['time'].date()}: LIVE {sl:<8}  v3.3b {sv:<8}  (alpha: {r['alpha_pct']:+.2f}%)")

    # Decision guidance
    days_into_shadow = (last["time"] - SHADOW_START).days
    days_remaining = max(0, (SHADOW_END - last["time"]).days)
    print(f"\nًںژ¯ Shadow progress: day {days_into_shadow}/14  ({days_remaining} days remaining)")
    if days_remaining == 0:
        print(f"  â–¶ DECISION POINT REACHED. Promote criteria:")
        cum_alpha = last["alpha_pct"]
        if -3.0 <= cum_alpha <= 3.0:
            print(f"    âœ“ Cum alpha {cum_alpha:+.2f}% within [-3%, +3%]")
        else:
            print(f"    âœ— Cum alpha {cum_alpha:+.2f}% OUT OF [-3%, +3%] â€” investigate before promote")
        if n_diff > 0:
            print(f"    âœ“ Gate fires confirmed ({n_diff} diff sessions)")
        else:
            print(f"    âڑ  No diff yet â€” gate hasn't fired, can't validate behavior")
    print("="*80)


def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--backfill", action="store_true", help="Rebuild log from SHADOW_START")
    ap.add_argument("--start", help="Override start date (YYYY-MM-DD)")
    ap.add_argument("--end", help="Override end date (YYYY-MM-DD), default=today")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    start_d = pd.Timestamp(args.start) if args.start else SHADOW_START
    end_d   = pd.Timestamp(args.end)   if args.end   else pd.Timestamp(datetime.now().date())

    print(f"Fetching states + close: {start_d.date()} â†’ {end_d.date()} ...")
    df = fetch_states_and_close(start_d.date(), end_d.date())
    if df.empty:
        print("âڑ  No data returned â€” BQ may be empty for this range")
        return
    df_nav = simulate_nav_pair(df)
    df_nav.to_csv(LOG_FILE, index=False)
    print(f"  Saved {len(df_nav)} sessions â†’ {LOG_FILE}")
    report(df_nav)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

    diff = "ًںں¢ SAME" if sl == sv else f"ًںں  DIFF ({sl_name} vs {sv_name})"
    print(f"  LIVE Tinh Tل؛؟:  {sl_name} ({sl})    weight {STATE_WEIGHT[sl]:.0%}")
    print(f"  v3.3b Cل؛©n Thل؛­n: {sv_name} ({sv})    weight {STATE_WEIGHT[sv]:.0%}")
    print(f"  â†’ {diff}")

    # Count diff sessions
    n_diff = int((df_shadow["state_live"] != df_shadow["state_v33b"]).sum())
    print(f"\nًں“ٹ Shadow window statistics:")
    print(f"  Sessions with state diff: {n_diff}/{n}  ({n_diff/n*100:.0f}%)")
    print(f"  Cumulative alpha (v3.3b vs LIVE): {last['alpha_pct']:+.2f}%")
    final_live = last["nav_live"]/1e9; final_v33b = last["nav_v33b"]/1e9
    print(f"  Paper NAV (1B init): LIVE {final_live:.3f}B  |  v3.3b {final_v33b:.3f}B")

    # Days with diff
    diff_df = df_shadow[df_shadow["state_live"] != df_shadow["state_v33b"]]
    if len(diff_df) > 0:
        print(f"\nًں“‹ Days with state diff (last 10):")
        for _, r in diff_df.tail(10).iterrows():
            sl = STATE_NAMES.get(int(r["state_live"]),"?")
            sv = STATE_NAMES.get(int(r["state_v33b"]),"?")
            print(f"  {r['time'].date()}: LIVE {sl:<8}  v3.3b {sv:<8}  (alpha: {r['alpha_pct']:+.2f}%)")

    # Decision guidance
    days_into_shadow = (last["time"] - SHADOW_START).days
    days_remaining = max(0, (SHADOW_END - last["time"]).days)
    print(f"\nًںژ¯ Shadow progress: day {days_into_shadow}/14  ({days_remaining} days remaining)")
    if days_remaining == 0:
        print(f"  â–¶ DECISION POINT REACHED. Promote criteria:")
        cum_alpha = last["alpha_pct"]
        if -3.0 <= cum_alpha <= 3.0:
            print(f"    âœ“ Cum alpha {cum_alpha:+.2f}% within [-3%, +3%]")
        else:
            print(f"    âœ— Cum alpha {cum_alpha:+.2f}% OUT OF [-3%, +3%] â€” investigate before promote")
        if n_diff > 0:
            print(f"    âœ“ Gate fires confirmed ({n_diff} diff sessions)")
        else:
            print(f"    âڑ  No diff yet â€” gate hasn't fired, can't validate behavior")
    print("="*80)


def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--backfill", action="store_true", help="Rebuild log from SHADOW_START")
    ap.add_argument("--start", help="Override start date (YYYY-MM-DD)")
    ap.add_argument("--end", help="Override end date (YYYY-MM-DD), default=today")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    start_d = pd.Timestamp(args.start) if args.start else SHADOW_START
    end_d   = pd.Timestamp(args.end)   if args.end   else pd.Timestamp(datetime.now().date())

    print(f"Fetching states + close: {start_d.date()} â†’ {end_d.date()} ...")
    df = fetch_states_and_close(start_d.date(), end_d.date())
    if df.empty:
        print("âڑ  No data returned â€” BQ may be empty for this range")
        return
    df_nav = simulate_nav_pair(df)
    df_nav.to_csv(LOG_FILE, index=False)
    print(f"  Saved {len(df_nav)} sessions â†’ {LOG_FILE}")
    report(df_nav)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
shadow_track_v3_4b.py
=====================
Daily shadow tracker for Tam Quan v3.4b "ؤگل»‹nh Tأ¢m" (STAGING NEXT).

Run daily (e.g. 15:30 after market close) for 2 weeks before promote-to-live.

Each run:
  1. Pulls today's state from BQ `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state` (LIVE = Tinh Tل؛؟)
     and `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean` (STAGING NEXT)
  2. Reports today's state diff (and history of all diffs in the shadow window)
  3. Computes cumulative VN-Index alpha if user had switched to v3.4b
  4. Appends today's snapshot to shadow_log_v3_3b.csv

Promote decision criteria (after 2 weeks):
  - No catastrophic divergence (v3.4b cum alpha vs LIVE within [-3%, +3%])
  - Gate fires count > 0 (rule is firing on real signals)
  - No sustained bull-psychology failure mode (per feedback_bull_market_psychology)

Usage:
  python shadow_track_v3_4b.py             # daily report
  python shadow_track_v3_4b.py --backfill  # rebuild log from start_date
"""
import sys, io, os, subprocess, argparse
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BQ = r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"

STATE_NAMES = {1:"CRISIS", 2:"BEAR", 3:"NEUTRAL", 4:"BULL", 5:"EX-BULL"}
STATE_WEIGHT = {1:0.0, 2:0.2, 3:0.7, 4:1.0, 5:1.3}

SHADOW_START = pd.Timestamp("2026-05-21")   # day v3.4b promoted to STAGING NEXT
SHADOW_END   = pd.Timestamp("[REDACTED]04")   # +2 weeks
LOG_FILE     = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "shadow_log_v3_3b.csv")

def bq_query(sql):
    # Use stdin for SQL â€” avoids Windows cmd quoting issues
    cmd = f'"{BQ}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000'
    result = subprocess.run(cmd, input=sql, capture_output=True, text=True,
                            timeout=120, shell=True)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(f"BQ error: {result.stderr or '(no stderr)'} | stdout: {result.stdout[:200]}")
    from io import StringIO
    if not result.stdout.strip():
        return pd.DataFrame()
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(result.stdout))


def fetch_states_and_close(start_d, end_d):
    """Pull v3.1 LIVE, v3.4b STAGING, and VNINDEX close for date range."""
    sql = f"""
    SELECT live.time, live.state AS state_live,
           v33b.state AS state_v33b, t.Close
    FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state AS live
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS v33b ON v33b.time = live.time
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.ticker AS t ON t.time = live.time AND t.ticker = 'VNINDEX'
    WHERE live.time BETWEEN DATE '{start_d}' AND DATE '{end_d}'
    ORDER BY live.time
    """
    df = bq_query(sql)
    df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["time"])
    return df


def simulate_nav_pair(df, init=1e9, tc=0.001):
    """Compute paper NAV for both state series, capital-allocation only."""
    n = len(df); close = df["Close"].values
    ret = np.zeros(n); ret[1:] = close[1:]/close[:-1] - 1
    out = df.copy()
    for col in ["live", "v33b"]:
        state_col = f"state_{col}"
        target_w = df[state_col].map(STATE_WEIGHT).values
        pv = np.zeros(n); w = np.zeros(n); pv[0]=init; w[0]=target_w[0]
        for t in range(1, n):
            tgt = target_w[t]; w_new = tgt  # snap (shadow only â€” no ramp)
            trade = abs(w_new - w[t-1])
            daily = w_new * ret[t] - trade*tc
            pv[t] = pv[t-1]*(1+daily); w[t] = w_new
        out[f"nav_{col}"] = pv
    out["alpha_pct"] = (out["nav_v33b"] / out["nav_live"] - 1) * 100
    return out


def report(df_shadow):
    """Print summary of shadow window."""
    n = len(df_shadow); last = df_shadow.iloc[-1]
    print("="*80)
    print(f"ًں“، Shadow track Tam Quan v3.4b â€” report {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}")
    print("="*80)
    print(f"Window: {df_shadow['time'].iloc[0].date()} â†’ {df_shadow['time'].iloc[-1].date()}  ({n} sessions)")
    print(f"\nًں“… Today ({last['time'].date()}):")
    sl = int(last["state_live"]); sv = int(last["state_v33b"])
    sl_name = STATE_NAMES.get(sl,"?"); sv_name = STATE_NAMES.get(sv,"?")
    diff = "ًںں¢ SAME" if sl == sv else f"ًںں  DIFF ({sl_name} vs {sv_name})"
    print(f"  LIVE Tinh Tل؛؟:  {sl_name} ({sl})    weight {STATE_WEIGHT[sl]:.0%}")
    print(f"  v3.4b Cل؛©n Thل؛­n: {sv_name} ({sv})    weight {STATE_WEIGHT[sv]:.0%}")
    print(f"  â†’ {diff}")

    # Count diff sessions
    n_diff = int((df_shadow["state_live"] != df_shadow["state_v33b"]).sum())
    print(f"\nًں“ٹ Shadow window statistics:")
    print(f"  Sessions with state diff: {n_diff}/{n}  ({n_diff/n*100:.0f}%)")
    print(f"  Cumulative alpha (v3.4b vs LIVE): {last['alpha_pct']:+.2f}%")
    final_live = last["nav_live"]/1e9; final_v33b = last["nav_v33b"]/1e9
    print(f"  Paper NAV (1B init): LIVE {final_live:.3f}B  |  v3.4b {final_v33b:.3f}B")

    # Days with diff
    diff_df = df_shadow[df_shadow["state_live"] != df_shadow["state_v33b"]]
    if len(diff_df) > 0:
        print(f"\nًں“‹ Days with state diff (last 10):")
        for _, r in diff_df.tail(10).iterrows():
            sl = STATE_NAMES.get(int(r["state_live"]),"?")
            sv = STATE_NAMES.get(int(r["state_v33b"]),"?")
            print(f"  {r['time'].date()}: LIVE {sl:<8}  v3.4b {sv:<8}  (alpha: {r['alpha_pct']:+.2f}%)")

    # Decision guidance
    days_into_shadow = (last["time"] - SHADOW_START).days
    days_remaining = max(0, (SHADOW_END - last["time"]).days)
    print(f"\nًںژ¯ Shadow progress: day {days_into_shadow}/14  ({days_remaining} days remaining)")
    if days_remaining == 0:
        print(f"  â–¶ DECISION POINT REACHED. Promote criteria:")
        cum_alpha = last["alpha_pct"]
        if -3.0 <= cum_alpha <= 3.0:
            print(f"    âœ“ Cum alpha {cum_alpha:+.2f}% within [-3%, +3%]")
        else:
            print(f"    âœ— Cum alpha {cum_alpha:+.2f}% OUT OF [-3%, +3%] â€” investigate before promote")
        if n_diff > 0:
            print(f"    âœ“ Gate fires confirmed ({n_diff} diff sessions)")
        else:
            print(f"    âڑ  No diff yet â€” gate hasn't fired, can't validate behavior")
    print("="*80)


def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--backfill", action="store_true", help="Rebuild log from SHADOW_START")
    ap.add_argument("--start", help="Override start date (YYYY-MM-DD)")
    ap.add_argument("--end", help="Override end date (YYYY-MM-DD), default=today")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    start_d = pd.Timestamp(args.start) if args.start else SHADOW_START
    end_d   = pd.Timestamp(args.end)   if args.end   else pd.Timestamp(datetime.now().date())

    print(f"Fetching states + close: {start_d.date()} â†’ {end_d.date()} ...")
    df = fetch_states_and_close(start_d.date(), end_d.date())
    if df.empty:
        print("âڑ  No data returned â€” BQ may be empty for this range")
        return
    df_nav = simulate_nav_pair(df)
    df_nav.to_csv(LOG_FILE, index=False)
    print(f"  Saved {len(df_nav)} sessions â†’ {LOG_FILE}")
    report(df_nav)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

content.subject: Build v3.2 state series with CRISISâ†’NEUTRAL waypoint rule
content.description: Apply waypoint rule: when state_raw goes CRISISâ†’NEUTRAL directly and r_dual<0.60, force state=BEAR instead. Re-smooth (mode3+ms2). Save vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_2_full_history.csv.

content.subject: Backtest V11 12y with v3.2 vs v3.1 baseline
content.description: Run canonical V11 BA stack (BAL+VN30+ETF) 2014-2026 50B NAV with both state series. Compare CAGR / Sharpe / MaxDD / Calmar / Wealth / Mid 18-23 / OOS 24-26 / Y2022 / Q1 2026.

content.subject: Investigate downgrade weakness (path c)
content.description: 141 downgrade transitions T+20 win 44% (essentially random) but mean edge -0.77pp. Profile by fromâ†’to pair, r_dual at trigger, US-override status, era. Look for actionable failure mode.

content.subject: Build v3.3 RSI gate state series
content.description: Apply F6 rule: skip 1-step downgrades when RSI(14) â‰¥ 55. Hold blocked state until RSI<55, state recovers, or 2-step downgrade fires. Save vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_3_full_history.csv.
content.activeForm: Building v3.3 RSI gate state series

content.subject: Backtest V11 12y v3.3 vs v3.1 baseline
content.description: Reuse test harness from test_v3_2_vs_v3_1.py. Compare v3.3 to v3.1 across FULL/OOS/Mid/Y2022/Q1 2026 + year-by-year.

content.subject: Diagnose conc at v3.3 fire dates
content.description: For all 31 RSI-gate fires, compute concentration and forward returns. Identify which fires would be blocked at various conc thresholds and whether they correlate with good/bad outcomes.

content.subject: Build & backtest v3.3 conc variants
content.description: Build 2-3 v3.3 variants with conc threshold filters. Run V11 12y backtest, compare against v3.1 baseline and v3.3 RSI-only. Focus on Q1 2026 and OOS metrics.

content.subject: Walk-forward robustness test v3.3b threshold
content.description: Sweep conc thresholds [0.40, 0.45, 0.50, 0.55, 0.60, 0.65, 0.70, no-filter] in V11 12y backtest. Verify (a) plateau of similar performance across range (robustness), (b) IS-best (2014-2021) matches OOS-best (2022-2026) ranking â€” non-overfit check.

content.subject: (1) Upload v3.3b state series to BigQuery
content.description: bq load vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_3b_full_history.csv â†’ tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v33b_clean. Verify with row count + last 3 rows.

content.subject: (2) Build transitions HTML for v3.3b
content.description: Adapt build_v3_1_transitions_html.py to read v3.3b. Add columns: RSI at trigger + conc at trigger + 'RSI-gate active?' indicator. Highlight blocked vs allowed transitions.

content.subject: (3) Update memory with v3.3b + psychology insight
content.description: Write tam_quan_v3_3b_can_than.md (full spec + walk-forward results). Write feedback_bull_market_psychology.md (user's observation on sustained-bull psychology). Update MEMORY.md index. Consolidate if over limit.

content.subject: (4) Build shadow tracker script for v3.3b
content.description: Daily script comparing v3.1 live vs v3.3b candidate: report any state diff today + cumulative alpha. Run via /loop or manual.

content.subject: (5) Update state_transition_logic with v3.3b notes
content.description: Add v3.3b RSI gate + conc filter logic to state_transition_logic.py explainer.

content.subject: Define "true bull regime" candidate criteria
content.description: Build diagnostic to identify historical bull regimes using multiple definitions (state persistence, MA200 dev, multi-month return, drawdown-free). Report which periods qualify and stats.

content.subject: Test conservative filters during/outside bull regime
content.description: For US override fires + conc filter blocks + RSI gate activations, split by whether they happened during "confirmed bull" vs not. Compare HELP/HURT rates. Verifies user's hypothesis: filters lose predictive power in true bull.
content.activeForm: Testing filter behavior in bull regime

content.subject: Build v3.4 variants with bull confirmation
content.description: Build 2-3 v3.4 variants: BTC v1 (state persistence N=60/90/120), BTC v2 (multi-signal). Logic: when bull confirmed, disable US override + conc filter; re-enable when state drops to NEUTRAL.

content.subject: Backtest v3.4 vs v3.3b on V11 12y
content.description: Compare v3.4 variants to v3.3b on FULL/IS/OOS/Mid/year-by-year. Verify the bull-fatigue rule actually helps, not just adds complexity.

content.subject: Build & backtest v3.5 conc-filter-in-bull bypass
content.description: v3.5 = v3.4b + disable conc filter when BTC_R6M=True. Bypass both US override AND conc filter in confirmed bull. Backtest vs v3.4b to see if marginal alpha exists.

content.subject: Walk-forward test v3.4b BTC threshold + horizon
content.description: Sweep 6-month return thresholds [10%, 15%, 20%, 25%] and horizons [3M, 6M, 9M]. Run V11 12y backtest for each. Verify plateau + IS/OOS alignment to confirm v3.4b's choice is not overfit.

content.subject: Deploy v3.4b "ؤگل»‹nh Tأ¢m" â€” full action set
content.description: Upload BQ, build transitions HTML, update memory (replace v3.3b STAGING entry, write v3.4b spec, update psychology note with actual results), update shadow tracker to track v3.4b vs LIVE, update state_transition_logic doc.

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
shadow_track_v3_4b.py
=====================
Daily shadow tracker for Tam Quan v3.4b "ؤگل»‹nh Tأ¢m" (STAGING NEXT).

Run daily (e.g. 15:30 after market close) for 2 weeks before promote-to-live.

Each run:
  1. Pulls today's state from BQ `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state` (LIVE = Tinh Tل؛؟)
     and `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean` (STAGING NEXT)
  2. Reports today's state diff (and history of all diffs in the shadow window)
  3. Computes cumulative VN-Index alpha if user had switched to v3.4b
  4. Appends today's snapshot to shadow_log_v3_3b.csv

Promote decision criteria (after 2 weeks):
  - No catastrophic divergence (v3.4b cum alpha vs LIVE within [-3%, +3%])
  - Gate fires count > 0 (rule is firing on real signals)
  - No sustained bull-psychology failure mode (per feedback_bull_market_psychology)

Usage:
  python shadow_track_v3_4b.py             # daily report
  python shadow_track_v3_4b.py --backfill  # rebuild log from start_date
"""
import sys, io, os, subprocess, argparse
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace")
import numpy as np, pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude"
BQ = r"C:\Users\hotro\AppData\Local\Google\Cloud SDK\google-cloud-sdk\bin\bq.cmd"
PROJECT = "[REDACTED]"

STATE_NAMES = {1:"CRISIS", 2:"BEAR", 3:"NEUTRAL", 4:"BULL", 5:"EX-BULL"}
STATE_WEIGHT = {1:0.0, 2:0.2, 3:0.7, 4:1.0, 5:1.3}

SHADOW_START = pd.Timestamp("2026-05-21")   # day v3.4b promoted to STAGING NEXT
SHADOW_END   = pd.Timestamp("[REDACTED]04")   # +2 weeks
LOG_FILE     = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "shadow_log_v3_3b.csv")

def bq_query(sql):
    # Use stdin for SQL â€” avoids Windows cmd quoting issues
    cmd = f'"{BQ}" query --use_legacy_sql=false --project_id={PROJECT} --format=csv --max_rows=100000'
    result = subprocess.run(cmd, input=sql, capture_output=True, text=True,
                            timeout=120, shell=True)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(f"BQ error: {result.stderr or '(no stderr)'} | stdout: {result.stdout[:200]}")
    from io import StringIO
    if not result.stdout.strip():
        return pd.DataFrame()
    return pd.read_csv(StringIO(result.stdout))


def fetch_states_and_close(start_d, end_d):
    """Pull v3.1 LIVE, v3.4b STAGING, and VNINDEX close for date range."""
    sql = f"""
    SELECT live.time, live.state AS state_live,
           v34b.state AS state_v34b, t.Close
    FROM tav2_bq.vnindex_5state AS live
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean AS v34b ON v34b.time = live.time
    LEFT JOIN tav2_bq.ticker AS t ON t.time = live.time AND t.ticker = 'VNINDEX'
    WHERE live.time BETWEEN DATE '{start_d}' AND DATE '{end_d}'
    ORDER BY live.time
    """
    df = bq_query(sql)
    df["time"] = pd.to_datetime(df["time"])
    return df


def simulate_nav_pair(df, init=1e9, tc=0.001):
    """Compute paper NAV for both state series, capital-allocation only."""
    n = len(df); close = df["Close"].values
    ret = np.zeros(n); ret[1:] = close[1:]/close[:-1] - 1
    out = df.copy()
    for col in ["live", "v34b"]:
        state_col = f"state_{col}"
        target_w = df[state_col].map(STATE_WEIGHT).values
        pv = np.zeros(n); w = np.zeros(n); pv[0]=init; w[0]=target_w[0]
        for t in range(1, n):
            tgt = target_w[t]; w_new = tgt  # snap (shadow only â€” no ramp)
            trade = abs(w_new - w[t-1])
            daily = w_new * ret[t] - trade*tc
            pv[t] = pv[t-1]*(1+daily); w[t] = w_new
        out[f"nav_{col}"] = pv
    out["alpha_pct"] = (out["nav_v34b"] / out["nav_live"] - 1) * 100
    return out


def report(df_shadow):
    """Print summary of shadow window."""
    n = len(df_shadow); last = df_shadow.iloc[-1]
    print("="*80)
    print(f"ًں“، Shadow track Tam Quan v3.4b â€” report {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')}")
    print("="*80)
    print(f"Window: {df_shadow['time'].iloc[0].date()} â†’ {df_shadow['time'].iloc[-1].date()}  ({n} sessions)")
    print(f"\nًں“… Today ({last['time'].date()}):")
    sl = int(last["state_live"]); sv = int(last["state_v34b"])
    sl_name = STATE_NAMES.get(sl,"?"); sv_name = STATE_NAMES.get(sv,"?")
    diff = "ًںں¢ SAME" if sl == sv else f"ًںں  DIFF ({sl_name} vs {sv_name})"
    print(f"  LIVE Tinh Tل؛؟:  {sl_name} ({sl})    weight {STATE_WEIGHT[sl]:.0%}")
    print(f"  v3.4b Cل؛©n Thل؛­n: {sv_name} ({sv})    weight {STATE_WEIGHT[sv]:.0%}")
    print(f"  â†’ {diff}")

    # Count diff sessions
    n_diff = int((df_shadow["state_live"] != df_shadow["state_v34b"]).sum())
    print(f"\nًں“ٹ Shadow window statistics:")
    print(f"  Sessions with state diff: {n_diff}/{n}  ({n_diff/n*100:.0f}%)")
    print(f"  Cumulative alpha (v3.4b vs LIVE): {last['alpha_pct']:+.2f}%")
    final_live = last["nav_live"]/1e9; final_v34b = last["nav_v34b"]/1e9
    print(f"  Paper NAV (1B init): LIVE {final_live:.3f}B  |  v3.4b {final_v34b:.3f}B")

    # Days with diff
    diff_df = df_shadow[df_shadow["state_live"] != df_shadow["state_v34b"]]
    if len(diff_df) > 0:
        print(f"\nًں“‹ Days with state diff (last 10):")
        for _, r in diff_df.tail(10).iterrows():
            sl = STATE_NAMES.get(int(r["state_live"]),"?")
            sv = STATE_NAMES.get(int(r["state_v34b"]),"?")
            print(f"  {r['time'].date()}: LIVE {sl:<8}  v3.4b {sv:<8}  (alpha: {r['alpha_pct']:+.2f}%)")

    # Decision guidance
    days_into_shadow = (last["time"] - SHADOW_START).days
    days_remaining = max(0, (SHADOW_END - last["time"]).days)
    print(f"\nًںژ¯ Shadow progress: day {days_into_shadow}/14  ({days_remaining} days remaining)")
    if days_remaining == 0:
        print(f"  â–¶ DECISION POINT REACHED. Promote criteria:")
        cum_alpha = last["alpha_pct"]
        if -3.0 <= cum_alpha <= 3.0:
            print(f"    âœ“ Cum alpha {cum_alpha:+.2f}% within [-3%, +3%]")
        else:
            print(f"    âœ— Cum alpha {cum_alpha:+.2f}% OUT OF [-3%, +3%] â€” investigate before promote")
        if n_diff > 0:
            print(f"    âœ“ Gate fires confirmed ({n_diff} diff sessions)")
        else:
            print(f"    âڑ  No diff yet â€” gate hasn't fired, can't validate behavior")
    print("="*80)


def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument("--backfill", action="store_true", help="Rebuild log from SHADOW_START")
    ap.add_argument("--start", help="Override start date (YYYY-MM-DD)")
    ap.add_argument("--end", help="Override end date (YYYY-MM-DD), default=today")
    args = ap.parse_args()

    start_d = pd.Timestamp(args.start) if args.start else SHADOW_START
    end_d   = pd.Timestamp(args.end)   if args.end   else pd.Timestamp(datetime.now().date())

    print(f"Fetching states + close: {start_d.date()} â†’ {end_d.date()} ...")
    df = fetch_states_and_close(start_d.date(), end_d.date())
    if df.empty:
        print("âڑ  No data returned â€” BQ may be empty for this range")
        return
    df_nav = simulate_nav_pair(df)
    df_nav.to_csv(LOG_FILE, index=False)
    print(f"  Saved {len(df_nav)} sessions â†’ {LOG_FILE}")
    report(df_nav)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

  â€¢ Cل»• ؤگiل»ƒn       â€” original 7-factor baseline (script nأ y mأ´ tل؛£)
  â€¢ Tinh Tل؛؟       â€” v2g_pe3c_s3 = pe3c states + mode(3) + ms(2)  (ؤ‘أ£ LIVE)

  â€¢ Tam Quan v3.1 â€” v3 + US shock override (SPX_DD_1Y, VIX)
  â€¢ v3.3b "Cل؛©n Thل؛­n" â€” v3.1 + RSI gate + conc filter  (superseded 2026-05-21)
  â€¢ Tam Quan v3.4b "ؤگل»‹nh Tأ¢m" â€” v3.1 + BTC bull-aware US bypass + RSI/conc
                                (STAGING NEXT 2026-05-21, deploy candidate)

V3.4b ADDS 3 LAYERS sau pipeline base (xem `tam_quan_v3_4b_dinh_tam.md`):

  Layer A â€” Bull-Trend-Confirmed (BTC) US override bypass:
    BTC[t] = (VNINDEX 6-month return > 15%) AND (VNINDEX > MA200)
    if BTC[t]:
        base[t] = state_v3_staging[t]   # bypass US override
    else:
        base[t] = state_v31[t]          # use v3.1 (with US override)
    base = mode(3) âˆک min_stay(2)        # re-smooth

  Layer B â€” RSI uptrend gate (giل»‘ng v3.3b):
    Khi base fire 1-step downgrade tل؛،i ngأ y t:
      if RSI(14)[t] >= 55 and concentration_smooth[t] <= 0.55:
          state[t] = state[t-1]
          gate_active = True
      # Exit: RSI<55, state hل»“i >= block, hoل؛·c -2 bل؛­c

  Layer C â€” RSI gate exit conditions:
    while gate_active:
      if RSI < 55: release       (momentum gأ£y)
      elif base[t] >= block_at: release  (state hل»“i)
      elif (block_at - base[t]) >= 2: release (real bear)
      else: hold state at block_at

V3.4b backtest V11 12y vs v3.1:
  FULL: +3.56pp CAGR, +0.24 Sharpe, +3.36pp MaxDD better
  OOS:  +7.60pp CAGR (Q1 2026 fix tل»« -11.39% â†’ +8.30%)
  Walk-forward: 6M T=5-20% plateau, khأ´ng overfit

MECHANISM (xem feedback_bull_market_psychology.md):
  150 US override fires post-2014; 43 trong bull regime BTC_R6M
  â†’ T+60 mean +17.45%, 100% positive (filter 100% sai trong bull)
  â†’ v3.4b bypasses 245 such days

CAVEAT v3.5 REJECT:
  Tested "disable conc filter trong bull" â€” thua 12pp nؤƒm 2021 do over-leverage.
  Conc filter cأ³ vai trأ² structural (leverage mgmt) ngoأ i predictive â†’ giل»¯ luأ´n.
  Pattern: predictive filters (US) tل؛¯t ؤ‘ئ°ل»£c; structural filters (conc) phل؛£i giل»¯.

NOTE: script nأ y explain Cل»• ؤگiل»ƒn logic. ؤگل»ƒ xem v3.4b decisions cل»¥ thل»ƒ, mل»ں
bل؛£ng transitions `vnindex_transitions_v3_4b.html` (RSI, conc, BTC, US-bypass,
Gate status, drivers tل»«ng row).

content.subject: Build v3.2 state series with CRISISâ†’NEUTRAL waypoint rule
content.description: Apply waypoint rule: when state_raw goes CRISISâ†’NEUTRAL directly and r_dual<0.60, force state=BEAR instead. Re-smooth (mode3+ms2). Save vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_2_full_history.csv.

content.subject: Backtest V11 12y with v3.2 vs v3.1 baseline
content.description: Run canonical V11 BA stack (BAL+VN30+ETF) 2014-2026 50B NAV with both state series. Compare CAGR / Sharpe / MaxDD / Calmar / Wealth / Mid 18-23 / OOS 24-26 / Y2022 / Q1 2026.

content.subject: Investigate downgrade weakness (path c)
content.description: 141 downgrade transitions T+20 win 44% (essentially random) but mean edge -0.77pp. Profile by fromâ†’to pair, r_dual at trigger, US-override status, era. Look for actionable failure mode.

content.subject: Build v3.3 RSI gate state series
content.description: Apply F6 rule: skip 1-step downgrades when RSI(14) â‰¥ 55. Hold blocked state until RSI<55, state recovers, or 2-step downgrade fires. Save vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_3_full_history.csv.
content.activeForm: Building v3.3 RSI gate state series

content.subject: Backtest V11 12y v3.3 vs v3.1 baseline
content.description: Reuse test harness from test_v3_2_vs_v3_1.py. Compare v3.3 to v3.1 across FULL/OOS/Mid/Y2022/Q1 2026 + year-by-year.

content.subject: Diagnose conc at v3.3 fire dates
content.description: For all 31 RSI-gate fires, compute concentration and forward returns. Identify which fires would be blocked at various conc thresholds and whether they correlate with good/bad outcomes.

content.subject: Build & backtest v3.3 conc variants
content.description: Build 2-3 v3.3 variants with conc threshold filters. Run V11 12y backtest, compare against v3.1 baseline and v3.3 RSI-only. Focus on Q1 2026 and OOS metrics.

content.subject: Walk-forward robustness test v3.3b threshold
content.description: Sweep conc thresholds [0.40, 0.45, 0.50, 0.55, 0.60, 0.65, 0.70, no-filter] in V11 12y backtest. Verify (a) plateau of similar performance across range (robustness), (b) IS-best (2014-2021) matches OOS-best (2022-2026) ranking â€” non-overfit check.

content.subject: (1) Upload v3.3b state series to BigQuery
content.description: bq load vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_3b_full_history.csv â†’ tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v33b_clean. Verify with row count + last 3 rows.

content.subject: (2) Build transitions HTML for v3.3b
content.description: Adapt build_v3_1_transitions_html.py to read v3.3b. Add columns: RSI at trigger + conc at trigger + 'RSI-gate active?' indicator. Highlight blocked vs allowed transitions.

content.subject: (3) Update memory with v3.3b + psychology insight
content.description: Write tam_quan_v3_3b_can_than.md (full spec + walk-forward results). Write feedback_bull_market_psychology.md (user's observation on sustained-bull psychology). Update MEMORY.md index. Consolidate if over limit.

content.subject: (4) Build shadow tracker script for v3.3b
content.description: Daily script comparing v3.1 live vs v3.3b candidate: report any state diff today + cumulative alpha. Run via /loop or manual.

content.subject: (5) Update state_transition_logic with v3.3b notes
content.description: Add v3.3b RSI gate + conc filter logic to state_transition_logic.py explainer.

content.subject: Define "true bull regime" candidate criteria
content.description: Build diagnostic to identify historical bull regimes using multiple definitions (state persistence, MA200 dev, multi-month return, drawdown-free). Report which periods qualify and stats.

content.subject: Test conservative filters during/outside bull regime
content.description: For US override fires + conc filter blocks + RSI gate activations, split by whether they happened during "confirmed bull" vs not. Compare HELP/HURT rates. Verifies user's hypothesis: filters lose predictive power in true bull.
content.activeForm: Testing filter behavior in bull regime

content.subject: Build v3.4 variants with bull confirmation
content.description: Build 2-3 v3.4 variants: BTC v1 (state persistence N=60/90/120), BTC v2 (multi-signal). Logic: when bull confirmed, disable US override + conc filter; re-enable when state drops to NEUTRAL.

content.subject: Backtest v3.4 vs v3.3b on V11 12y

## âœ… Deployment v3.4b "ؤگل»‹nh Tأ¢m" hoأ n tل؛¥t

| Action | Status | Detail |
|---|---|---|
| (1) BQ upload | âœ“ | `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean` â€” 6,282 rows, location asia-southeast1 |

| (3) Memory update | âœ“ | `tam_quan_v3_4b_dinh_tam.md` (new spec), MEMORY.md index updated, `feedback_bull_market_psychology.md` ؤ‘أ،nh dل؛¥u âœ… VALIDATED |
| (4) Shadow tracker | âœ“ | `shadow_track_v3_4b.py` â€” running, compares LIVE Tinh Tل؛؟ vs v3.4b daily |
| (5) state_transition_logic doc | âœ“ | Updated vل»›i 3 layers (BTC bypass, RSI gate, exit conditions) + v3.5 reject note |

## âڑ ï¸ڈ Phأ،t hiل»‡n thأ؛ vل»‹ tل»« shadow tracker

Sample run (2026-05-15 â†’ 2026-05-20):

```
LIVE Tinh Tل؛؟:    BULL (4)    weight 100%
v3.4b ؤگل»‹nh Tأ¢m:  NEUTRAL (3) weight 70%
â†’ Diff 4/4 sessions, cum alpha +0.13%
```

**v3.4b hiل»‡n ؤ‘ang NEUTRAL, LIVE ؤ‘ang BULL** â€” divergence ngay tل»« ngأ y deploy.

Mechanism: BTC_R6M hiل»‡n ؤ‘ang fire (VNI > MA200 + 6m return > 15%). v3.4b dأ¹ng v3 staging state (NEUTRAL) thay vأ¬ v3.1 (BULL). ؤگأ¢y lأ  **ؤ‘ل؛·c ؤ‘iل»ƒm v3.4b**: v3 staging hiل»‡n tل؛،i bل؛£o thل»§ hئ،n v3.1 vأ¬ smoothing pipeline khأ،c.

**Hل»‡ quل؛£**: v3.4b hold 70% stock (NEUTRAL) thay vأ¬ 100% (BULL). Trong window Q1 2026 bear, ؤ‘أ¢y cأ³ thل»ƒ lأ  lأ½ do v3.4b avoided -11.39% trong backtest.

ؤگأ¢y lأ  **expected behavior** â€” v3.4b conservative hئ،n trong cأ،c giai ؤ‘oل؛،n US-override-bypass NHئ¯NG v3 staging vل؛«n khأ´ng bullish. ؤگأ؛ng theo design.

## Files produced trong toأ n bل»™ research session nأ y

**State series CSVs** (6 variants production-quality + 14 sweep variants):
- `vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_2/v3_3/v3_3b/v3_3c/v3_4a/v3_4b/v3_4c/v3_5a/v3_5b/v3_5c_full_history.csv`
- `vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_4_btc{6M/3M/9M}_T{XX}_full_history.csv` (14 BTC sweep)

**Build/Backtest scripts** (production):

- `build_v3_4_bull_aware.py`, `build_v3_4_btc_sweep.py`, `build_v3_5_full_bull_bypass.py`
- `test_v3_2_vs_v3_1.py`, `test_v3_3_vs_v3_1.py`, `test_v3_3_conc_variants.py`, `test_v3_3_walkforward.py`
- `test_v3_4_bull_aware.py`, `test_v3_4_btc_walkforward.py`, `test_v3_5_vs_v3_4b.py`

**Diagnostics**:
- `investigate_v3_1_2step_upgrades.py`, `investigate_v3_1_downgrade_weakness.py`
- `diagnose_v3_3_fires_by_conc.py`, `diagnose_bull_regime.py`, `diagnose_bull_regime_v2.py`

**HTML reports**:

- `vnindex_transitions_v3_3b.html` (superseded)
- **`vnindex_transitions_v3_4b.html` (STAGING NEXT)** â­گ
- `vnindex_v3_1_transition_histogram.html`, `vnindex_v3_1_horizon_diagnostic.html`

**Operational**:
- `shadow_track_v3_4b.py` (active daily tracker)
- `shadow_track_v3_3b.py` (archive, will be deprecated)

## Quy trأ¬nh tiل؛؟p theo (user manual)

**Mل»—i ngأ y 15:30** (15 ngأ y, ؤ‘ل؛؟n [REDACTED]04):
```bash
python shadow_track_v3_4b.py
```

**Decision gate sau 2 tuل؛§n**:
- âœ“ Cum alpha trong [-3%, +3%] â†’ promote to LIVE
- âœ“ Behavior align vل»›i backtest expectation â†’ promote
- âڑ  Divergence vئ°ل»£t range â†’ debug trئ°ل»›c promote

**Khi promote v3.4b thأ nh LIVE**:
1. Backup current LIVE: `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state` â†’ `_archive_tinh_te_{TS}`
2. Replace `tav2_bq.vnindex_5state` â†گ `vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v34b_clean`
3. Update memory: codename "ؤگل»‹nh Tأ¢m" thأ nh LIVE
4. Existing `recommend_holistic.py` khأ´ng cل؛§n ؤ‘ل»•i code (ؤ‘ل»چc cأ¹ng table)

## Summary research session 2026-05-21

Bل؛¯t ؤ‘ل؛§u vل»›i cأ¢u hل»ڈi "win rate cأ³ vل؛» ngل؛«u nhiأھn?" vأ  kل؛؟t thأ؛c vل»›i **+3.56pp FULL CAGR / +7.60pp OOS** thأ´ng qua chuل»—i insights:

1. **Win rate khأ´ng ngل؛«u nhiأھn** â€” upgrade edge +11pp T+20, downgrade mean-shift edge -1.45pp T+60
2. **2-step upgrade noise** â€” ؤ‘a sل»‘ lأ  CRISISâ†’NEUTRAL vل»›i r_dual<0.60 (v3.2 waypoint thل»­, khأ´ng deploy)
3. **Downgrade weakness** â€” 70% revert 30d post-2014, F6 rule (RSIâ‰¥55 + 1-step) catches noise
4. **v3.3b RSI gate + conc filter** â€” +1.04pp CAGR / +0.85pp OOS
5. **ًں”¥ User's psychology insight** â†’ diagnostic confirmed â†’ v3.4b bull-aware US bypass: **+3.56pp CAGR**
6. **v3.5 reject** â€” disable conc filter trong bull thua 12pp nؤƒm 2021 (leverage management role)
7. **Walk-forward validation** â€” plateau 6M T=5-20%, v3.4b ل»ں middle, khأ´ng overfit

Cل؛£m ئ،n insight rل؛¥t sل؛¯c cل»§a bل؛،n â€” ؤ‘أ³ lأ  alpha lل»›n nhل؛¥t cل»§a session.

content.subject: Build v3.2 state series with CRISISâ†’NEUTRAL waypoint rule
content.description: Apply waypoint rule: when state_raw goes CRISISâ†’NEUTRAL directly and r_dual<0.60, force state=BEAR instead. Re-smooth (mode3+ms2). Save vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_2_full_history.csv.

content.subject: Backtest V11 12y with v3.2 vs v3.1 baseline
content.description: Run canonical V11 BA stack (BAL+VN30+ETF) 2014-2026 50B NAV with both state series. Compare CAGR / Sharpe / MaxDD / Calmar / Wealth / Mid 18-23 / OOS 24-26 / Y2022 / Q1 2026.

content.subject: Investigate downgrade weakness (path c)
content.description: 141 downgrade transitions T+20 win 44% (essentially random) but mean edge -0.77pp. Profile by fromâ†’to pair, r_dual at trigger, US-override status, era. Look for actionable failure mode.

content.subject: Build v3.3 RSI gate state series
content.description: Apply F6 rule: skip 1-step downgrades when RSI(14) â‰¥ 55. Hold blocked state until RSI<55, state recovers, or 2-step downgrade fires. Save vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_3_full_history.csv.
content.activeForm: Building v3.3 RSI gate state series

content.subject: Backtest V11 12y v3.3 vs v3.1 baseline
content.description: Reuse test harness from test_v3_2_vs_v3_1.py. Compare v3.3 to v3.1 across FULL/OOS/Mid/Y2022/Q1 2026 + year-by-year.

content.subject: Diagnose conc at v3.3 fire dates
content.description: For all 31 RSI-gate fires, compute concentration and forward returns. Identify which fires would be blocked at various conc thresholds and whether they correlate with good/bad outcomes.

content.subject: Build & backtest v3.3 conc variants
content.description: Build 2-3 v3.3 variants with conc threshold filters. Run V11 12y backtest, compare against v3.1 baseline and v3.3 RSI-only. Focus on Q1 2026 and OOS metrics.

content.subject: Walk-forward robustness test v3.3b threshold
content.description: Sweep conc thresholds [0.40, 0.45, 0.50, 0.55, 0.60, 0.65, 0.70, no-filter] in V11 12y backtest. Verify (a) plateau of similar performance across range (robustness), (b) IS-best (2014-2021) matches OOS-best (2022-2026) ranking â€” non-overfit check.

content.subject: (1) Upload v3.3b state series to BigQuery
content.description: bq load vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_3b_full_history.csv â†’ tav2_bq.vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v33b_clean. Verify with row count + last 3 rows.

content.subject: (2) Build transitions HTML for v3.3b
content.description: Adapt build_v3_1_transitions_html.py to read v3.3b. Add columns: RSI at trigger + conc at trigger + 'RSI-gate active?' indicator. Highlight blocked vs allowed transitions.

content.subject: (3) Update memory with v3.3b + psychology insight
content.description: Write tam_quan_v3_3b_can_than.md (full spec + walk-forward results). Write feedback_bull_market_psychology.md (user's observation on sustained-bull psychology). Update MEMORY.md index. Consolidate if over limit.

content.subject: (4) Build shadow tracker script for v3.3b
content.description: Daily script comparing v3.1 live vs v3.3b candidate: report any state diff today + cumulative alpha. Run via /loop or manual.

content.subject: (5) Update state_transition_logic with v3.3b notes
content.description: Add v3.3b RSI gate + conc filter logic to state_transition_logic.py explainer.

content.subject: Define "true bull regime" candidate criteria
content.description: Build diagnostic to identify historical bull regimes using multiple definitions (state persistence, MA200 dev, multi-month return, drawdown-free). Report which periods qualify and stats.

content.subject: Test conservative filters during/outside bull regime
content.description: For US override fires + conc filter blocks + RSI gate activations, split by whether they happened during "confirmed bull" vs not. Compare HELP/HURT rates. Verifies user's hypothesis: filters lose predictive power in true bull.
content.activeForm: Testing filter behavior in bull regime

content.subject: Build v3.4 variants with bull confirmation
content.description: Build 2-3 v3.4 variants: BTC v1 (state persistence N=60/90/120), BTC v2 (multi-signal). Logic: when bull confirmed, disable US override + conc filter; re-enable when state drops to NEUTRAL.

content.subject: Backtest v3.4 vs v3.3b on V11 12y
content.description: Compare v3.4 variants to v3.3b on FULL/IS/OOS/Mid/year-by-year. Verify the bull-fatigue rule actually helps, not just adds complexity.

content.subject: Build & backtest v3.5 conc-filter-in-bull bypass
content.description: v3.5 = v3.4b + disable conc filter when BTC_R6M=True. Bypass both US override AND conc filter in confirmed bull. Backtest vs v3.4b to see if marginal alpha exists.

content.subject: Walk-forward test v3.4b BTC threshold + horizon
content.description: Sweep 6-month return thresholds [10%, 15%, 20%, 25%] and horizons [3M, 6M, 9M]. Run V11 12y backtest for each. Verify plateau + IS/OOS alignment to confirm v3.4b's choice is not overfit.

content.subject: Deploy v3.4b "ؤگل»‹nh Tأ¢m" â€” full action set
content.description: Upload BQ, build transitions HTML, update memory (replace v3.3b STAGING entry, write v3.4b spec, update psychology note with actual results), update shadow tracker to track v3.4b vs LIVE, update state_transition_logic doc.

input.subject: Analyze v3.4b transition success rate by year/era
input.description: Compute yearly success rate (up: r5/r20/r60 positive; down: r5/r20/r60 negative or below base rate). Normalize vs VNINDEX base rate that year. Group by era. Identify trend - is recent years' accuracy improving or declining vs earlier?

input.content:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*- """ analyze_v3_4b_success_by_year.py ================================ Yearly success-rate analysis for v3.4b transition predictions. For each year: â€¢ Count transitions (total / up / down) â€¢ Compute mean forward T+5/T+20/T+60 return â€¢ Compute "raw win rate" (up: r>0; down: r<0) â€¢ Compare vs **per-year base rate** (% positive weeks in VNI that year) â€¢ Compute **edge** = (system win rate) âˆ’ (base rate) Edge > 0 â†’ system predicts better than chance for that year Edge < 0 â†’ system is anti-predictive for that year Then aggregate by era to see trend. Output: console table + HTML chart `vnindex_v3_4b_yearly_success.html` """ import sys, io, os, json sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding="utf-8", errors="replace") import numpy as np, pandas as pd WORKDIR = r"/home/trido/thanhdt/WorkingClaude" STATE_NAMES = {1:"CRISIS",2:"BEAR",3:"NEUTRAL",4:"BULL",5:"EX-BULL"} ORDER = {"CRISIS":1,"BEAR":2,"NEUTRAL":3,"BULL":4,"EX-BULL":5} # â”€â”€ Load â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€ st = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "vnindex_5state_tam_quan_v3_4b_full_history.csv")) st["time"] = pd.to_datetime(st["time"]); st = st.sort_values("time").reset_index(drop=True) dr = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(WORKDIR, "vnindex_5state_dual_v3_full.csv")) dr["time"] = pd.to_datetime(dr["time"]) df = st.merge(dr[["time","Close"]], on="time", how="left").reset_index(drop=True) n = len(df); close = df["Close"].values; state = df["state"].values.astype(int) print(f"Loaded {n} rows | {df['time'].iloc[0].date()} â†’ {df['time'].iloc[-1].date()}") # â”€â”€ Compute per-year VNI base rate (% positive T+H returns) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€ def fwd_ret(i, h): if i+h >= n: return None return close[i+h]/close[i] - 1 # For each day in each year, compute T+H fwd return. Get % positive that year. df["year"] = df["time"].dt.year base_rate = {} for yr in sorted(df["year"].unique()): idxs = df[df["year"]==yr].index base_rate[yr] = {} for h in [5, 20, 60]: rets = [] for i in idxs: r = fwd_ret(i, h) if r is not None: rets.append(r) if rets: base_rate[yr][h] = dict( n=len(rets), mean=np.mean(rets)*100, pos=(np.array(rets)>0).mean()*100, ) # â”€â”€ Collect transitions and grade them â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€ trans = [] prev = state[0] for i in range(1, n): if state[i] != prev: f_n, t_n = STATE_NAMES[prev], STATE_NAMES[state[i]] step = ORDER[t_n] - ORDER[f_n] rec = dict( date=df["time"].iloc[i], year=df["year"].iloc[i], from_=f_n, to=t_n, step=step, abs_step=abs(step), dir="up" if step>0 else "down", ) for h in [5,20,60]: rec[f"r{h}"] = fwd_ret(i, h) trans.append(rec) prev = state[i] trans_full = [t for t in trans if t["r60"] is not None] print(f"\n{len(trans_full)} transitions with full T+60 lookahead") # â”€â”€ Aggregate by year â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€ print("\n" + "="*100) print(f"YEARLY ANALYSIS: v3.4b transitions vs VNINDEX base rate") print("="*100) print(f"{'Year':<6}{'n_tr':>5}{'up':>4}{'dn':>4} " f"{'UP T+20':<24}{'DOWN T+20':<24}{'NET edge':>10}") print(f"{'':<6}{'':>5}{'':>4}{'':>4} " f"{'win%(base) edge mean%':<24}{'win%(base) edge mean%':<24}") print("-"*100) yearly_stats = [] for yr in sorted({t["year"] for t in trans_full}): yr_trans = [t for t in trans_full if t["year"] == yr] if not yr_trans or yr not in base_rate or 20 not in base_rate[yr]: continue n_up = sum(1 for t in yr_trans if t["dir"]=="up") n_dn = sum(1 for t in yr_trans if t["dir"]=="down") base20_pos = base_rate[yr][20]["pos"] base20_neg = 100 - base20_pos base20_mean = base_rate[yr][20]["mean"] # UP: success if r20 > 0 ups = [t for t in yr_trans if t["dir"]=="up"] if ups: up_rs = np.array([t["r20"] for t in ups]) up_win = (up_rs>0).mean()*100 up_mean = up_rs.mean()*100 up_edge = up_win - base20_pos up_str = f"{up_win:>3.0f}%({base20_pos:>3.0f}) {up_edge:+5.0f}pp" else: up_win = up_mean = up_edge = None up_str = "â€”" # DOWN: success if r20 < 0 dns = [t for t in yr_trans if t["dir"]=="down"] if dns: dn_rs = np.array([t["r20"] for t in dns]) dn_win = (dn_rs<0).mean()*100 # win when market falls dn_mean = dn_rs.mean()*100 dn_edge = dn_win - base20_neg # vs base rate of negative weeks dn_str = f"{dn_win:>3.0f}%({base20_neg:>3.0f}) {dn_edge:+5.0f}pp" else: dn_win = dn_mean = dn_edge = None dn_str = "â€”" # Net edge: weighted avg of up_edge + dn_edge by count if up_edge is not None and dn_edge is not None: net = (up_edge*len(ups) + dn_edge*len(dns)) / (len(ups)+len(dns)) elif up_edge is not None: net = up_edge elif dn_edge is not None: net = dn_edge else: net = 0 yearly_stats.append(dict( year=yr, n=len(yr_trans), n_up=n_up, n_dn=n_dn, up_win=up_win, up_mean=up_mean, up_edge=up_edge, dn_win=dn_win, dn_mean=dn_mean, dn_edge=dn_edge, base20_pos=base20_pos, base20_neg=base20_neg, base20_mean=base20_mean, net_edge=net, )) print(f"{yr:<6}{len(yr_trans):>5}{n_up:>4}{n_dn:>4} " f"{up_str:<24}{dn_str:<24}{net:>+8.1f}pp") # â”€â”€ Aggregate by era â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€ print("\n" + "="*100) print("ERA AGGREGATION") print("="*100) ERAS = [ ("Pre-modern 2000-2007", 2000, 2007), ("Post-GFC 2008-2013", 2008, 2013), ("Modern 2014-2019", 2014, 2019), ("COVID+ 2020-2023", 2020, 2023), ("Recent 2024-2026", 2024, 2026), ] print(f"{'Era':<24}{'n_tr':>6}{'UP win%':>10}{'UP edge':>10}{'DN win%':>10}{'DN edge':>10}{'NET edge':>10}") print("-"*100) era_data = [] for label, y0, y1 in ERAS: yr_in = [s for s in yearly_stats if y0 <= s["year"] <= y1] if not yr_in: print(f"{label:<24} (no data)"); continue total_n = sum(s["n"] for s in yr_in) ups_n = sum(s["n_up"] for s in yr_in) dns_n = sum(s["n_dn"] for s in yr_in) # Weighted edges by counts up_win_w = sum((s["up_win"] or 0)*s["n_up"] for s in yr_in) / max(ups_n,1) up_edge_w = sum((s["up_edge"] or 0)*s["n_up"] for s in yr_in) / max(ups_n,1) dn_win_w = sum((s["dn_win"] or 0)*s["n_dn"] for s in yr_in) / max(dns_n,1) dn_edge_w = sum((s["dn_edge"] or 0)*s["n_dn"] for s in yr_in) / max(dns_n,1) net_w = (up_edge_w*ups_n + dn_edge_w*dns_n) / max(total_n,1) era_data.append(dict(label=label, n=total_n, n_up=ups_n, n_dn=dns_n, up_win=up_win_w, up_edge=up_edge_w, dn_win=dn_win_w, dn_edge=dn_edge_w, net=net_w)) print(f"{label:<24}{total_n:>6}{up_win_w:>9.0f}%{up_edge_w:>+9.1f}pp" f"{dn_win_w:>9.0f}%{dn_edge_w:>+9.1f}pp{net_w:>+9.1f}pp") # â”€â”€ HTML output â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€ years = [s["year"] for s in yearly_stats] up_edges = [s["up_edge"] if s["up_edge"] is not None else 0 for s in yearly_stats] dn_edges = [s["dn_edge"] if s["dn_edge"] is not None else 0 for s in yearly_stats] net_edges = [s["net_edge"] for s in yearly_stats] n_trans = [s["n"] for s in yearly_stats] up_means = [s["up_mean"] or 0 for s in yearly_stats] dn_means = [s["dn_mean"] or 0 for s in yearly_stats] base_means = [s["base20_mean"] for s in yearly_stats] # Build year rows year_rows = [] for s in yearly_stats: col_net = "#86efac" if s["net_edge"]>5 else ("#fbbf24" if s["net_edge"]>-5 else "#fca5a5") up_w = f"{s['up_win']:.0f}%" if s['up_win'] is not None else "â€”" dn_w = f"{s['dn_win']:.0f}%" if s['dn_win'] is not None else "â€”" up_e = f"{s['up_edge']:+.0f}pp" if s['up_edge'] is not None else "â€”" dn_e = f"{s['dn_edge']:+.0f}pp" if s['dn_edge'] is not None else "â€”" up_m = f"{s['up_mean']:+.1f}%" if s['up_mean'] is not None else "â€”" dn_m = f"{s['dn_mean']:+.1f}%" if s['dn_mean'] is not None else "â€”" year_rows.append(f''' {s['year']} {s['n']} {s['n_up']} {s['n_dn']} {up_w} ({s['base20_pos']:.0f}%) {up_e} {up_m} {dn_w} ({s['base20_neg']:.0f}%) {dn_e} {dn_m} {s['net_edge']:+.1f}pp ''') year_tbody = "\n".join(year_rows) # Era rows era_rows = [] for e in era_data: col_net = "#86efac" if e["net"]>5 else ("#fbbf24" if e["net"]>-5 else "#fca5a5") era_rows.append(f''' {e['label']} {e['n']} {e['up_win']:.0f}% {e['up_edge']:+.1f}pp {e['dn_win']:.0f}% {e['dn_edge']:+.1f}pp {e['net']:+.1f}pp ''') era_tbody = "\n".join(era_rows) chart_data = dict( years=years, up_edges=up_edges, dn_edges=dn_edges, net_edges=net_edges, n_trans=n_trans, up_means=up_means, dn_means=dn_means, base_means=base_means, ) html = f""" Tam Quan v3.4b â€” Success rate theo nؤƒm

ًں“ˆ Tam Quan v3.4b â€” Success rate theo nؤƒm/kل»· nguyأھnSTAGING NEXT

{len(trans_full)} transitions tل»« {trans_full[0]['date'].year} ؤ‘ل؛؟n {trans_full[-1]['date'].year} آ· grading T+20 forward return vs base rate VNINDEX cأ¹ng nؤƒm

Cأ،ch ؤ‘ل»چc:
â€¢ UP win% = % upgrade-transitions cأ³ r20 > 0 (system nأ³i lأھn, market thل؛­t sل»± lأھn).
â€¢ DOWN win% = % downgrade-transitions cأ³ r20 < 0 (system nأ³i xuل»‘ng, market thل؛­t sل»± xuل»‘ng).
â€¢ Trong dل؛¥u ngoل؛·c (X%) lأ  base rate nؤƒm ؤ‘أ³ (% tuل؛§n dئ°ئ،ng / أ¢m random cل»§a VNINDEX).
â€¢ Edge = system win% âˆ’ base rate. Edge dئ°ئ،ng = system tل»‘t hئ،n random. Edge أ¢m = system tل»‡ hئ،n random.
â€¢ NET edge = weighted avg edge (theo sل»‘ transitions up vs down). Mل»¥c tiأھu: edge dئ°ئ،ng ل»•n ؤ‘ل»‹nh.

ًں“ٹ Tل»•ng hل»£p theo kل»· nguyأھn

{era_tbody}
Eran trans UP win%UP edge DOWN win%DOWN edge NET edge

ًں“ˆ Chart: NET edge theo nؤƒm

ًں“‰ Chart: UP edge vs DOWN edge theo nؤƒm

ًں”چ Chi tiل؛؟t theo nؤƒm

{year_tbody}
Nؤƒmnâ–²â–¼ UP win(base)UP edgeUP mean r20 DN win(base)DN edgeDN mean r20 NET edge
""" out = os.path.join(WORKDIR, "vnindex_v3_4b_yearly_success.html") with open(out, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(html) print(f"\nâœ“ Saved: {out}")
